title: Diagnose a connection timeout from a stack trace
prompt:
Diagnose this incident. What's happening and what should we do about it?

```
2026-04-21T03:14:09Z  ERROR  payments.gateway  request to https://api.stripe.com/v1/charges failed
Traceback (most recent call last):
  File "/app/payments/gateway.py", line 88, in post
    resp = self._session.post(url, data=payload, timeout=5)
  File "/usr/local/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/adapters.py", line 532, in send
    raise ConnectTimeout(e, request=request)
requests.exceptions.ConnectTimeout: HTTPSConnectionPool(host='api.stripe.com', port=443):
  Max retries exceeded with url: /v1/charges (Caused by ConnectTimeoutError(
    <urllib3.connection.HTTPSConnection object at 0x7f3b1c0a2b50>,
    'Connection to api.stripe.com timed out. (connect timeout=5)'))
```

This happens roughly once every 200 requests during peak traffic.
